Package neqsim.process.equipment.reactor

Class CatalystDeactivationKinetics

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.reactor.CatalystDeactivationKinetics
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class CatalystDeactivationKinetics extends Object implements Serializable
Screening model for hydrogen-production catalyst deactivation.

The model combines simple first-order damage rates for sulfur poisoning, chloride poisoning, coking and thermal sintering. It is intended for early SMR, WGS and ammonia-cracking studies where a reactor or CatalystBed needs a transparent activity factor over operating time.

The constants are deliberately conservative order-of-magnitude defaults. Vendor-specific catalysts should replace the defaults with measured rates before detailed design.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • CatalystDeactivationKinetics

      public CatalystDeactivationKinetics()
      Creates a catalyst deactivation model with nickel reforming defaults.

    • CatalystDeactivationKinetics

      public CatalystDeactivationKinetics(CatalystDeactivationKinetics.CatalystFamily catalystFamily)
      Creates a catalyst deactivation model for a catalyst family.
      Parameters:
      catalystFamily - catalyst family, not null

  • Method Details

    • setCatalystFamily

      public CatalystDeactivationKinetics setCatalystFamily(CatalystDeactivationKinetics.CatalystFamily catalystFamily)
      Sets the catalyst family.
      Parameters:
      catalystFamily - catalyst family, not null
      Returns:
      this deactivation model

    • setTemperature

      public CatalystDeactivationKinetics setTemperature(double temperatureK)
      Sets the catalyst-bed operating temperature.
      Parameters:
      temperatureK - temperature in K, must be greater than 0
      Returns:
      this deactivation model

    • setOperationHours

      public CatalystDeactivationKinetics setOperationHours(double operationHours)
      Sets operating time.
      Parameters:
      operationHours - operating time in hours, must be non-negative
      Returns:
      this deactivation model

    • setSulfurPpmv

      public CatalystDeactivationKinetics setSulfurPpmv(double sulfurPpmv)
      Sets sulfur slip to the catalyst bed.
      Parameters:
      sulfurPpmv - sulfur compounds as H2S-equivalent ppmv, must be non-negative
      Returns:
      this deactivation model

    • setChloridePpmv

      public CatalystDeactivationKinetics setChloridePpmv(double chloridePpmv)
      Sets chloride slip to the catalyst bed.
      Parameters:
      chloridePpmv - chloride compounds as HCl-equivalent ppmv, must be non-negative
      Returns:
      this deactivation model

    • setCarbonPotential

      public CatalystDeactivationKinetics setCarbonPotential(double carbonPotential)
      Sets a dimensionless carbon-formation driving force.
      Parameters:
      carbonPotential - carbon potential, where 0 is no coking drive and 1 is severe
      Returns:
      this deactivation model

    • setSteamToCarbonRatio

      public CatalystDeactivationKinetics setSteamToCarbonRatio(double steamToCarbonRatio)
      Sets steam-to-carbon ratio for coking suppression.
      Parameters:
      steamToCarbonRatio - steam-to-carbon molar ratio, must be non-negative
      Returns:
      this deactivation model

    • getSulfurPoisoningRatePerHour

      Gets the sulfur poisoning damage rate.
      Returns:
      sulfur poisoning rate in 1/h

      Calculates the total first-order deactivation rate.
      Returns:

    • calculateActivity

      public double calculateActivity()
      Calculates remaining catalyst activity after the configured operating time.
      Returns:
      catalyst activity factor in the range 0 to 1

    • applyTo

      public double applyTo(CatalystBed catalystBed)
      Applies the calculated activity to a CatalystBed instance.
      Parameters:
      catalystBed - catalyst bed to update, not null
      Returns:
      applied activity factor

    • estimateTimeToActivity

      public double estimateTimeToActivity(double activityThreshold)
      Estimates operating time until the catalyst reaches a target activity.
      Parameters:
      activityThreshold - target activity in the interval (0, 1]
      Returns:
      time in hours, or positive infinity when no deactivation rate is present

    • getDominantMechanism

      public String getDominantMechanism()
      Identifies the largest deactivation mechanism at the current conditions.
      Returns:
      mechanism name

    • getRateBreakdown

      Gets a rate breakdown for all deactivation mechanisms.
      Returns:
      ordered map of mechanism names to rates in 1/h
